prompt: I'm in a Slack app repo and `slack run` seems to be using the wrong workspace/app. Give me the safest command sequence to diagnose it before I change anything.
assertions: Includes safe preflight commands: slack version, slack auth list, and slack doctor
Mentions inspecting .slack project metadata before changing configuration
Explains using explicit --team and/or --app to resolve workspace/app selection
Avoids destructive commands and avoids exposing secrets
